title: Sātkhira Heat Wave
lead: Sātkhira is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.86. The city's temperature has reached extremely high levels, causing severe heat stress.
body:
The current heat wave in Sātkhira is characterized by a high temperature and high humidity, with an Umidita of 76%. 
 The heat index is further exacerbated by the low wind speed, with a Vento of 11.9 km/h. 
 The CDD of 12.5 GG indicates a high energy demand for cooling, while the HDD of 0.0 GG shows no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
